div.p: Implementation Spec: Push-Pull Synchronization via Merkle Tree / Version Vector Digests Target Port: UDP/7946 (Gossip Control Plane)
Invariant: syncInProgress == false Task: Waiting for Gossip Clock Tick Interval: 500ms + rand(200ms)
Algorithm: Weighted Random Selection Input: PeerTable (Status == ALIVE) Output: targetPeerID
Action: Atomic local snapshot Op: Calculate Merkle Roots Format: Protobuf/Snappy Compressed
Logic: Symmetric Difference (Δ) Output: weNeed[], theyNeed[]
Phase 1: Push (Local -> Remote) Phase 2: Pull (Remote -> Local) Batching: 1024 keys/msg
Update: SyncMatrix[peerID].LastSuccess Action: Release Local Write-Lock
